untranslatable_reason: This is a pairs trading strategy requiring: (1) OLS regression computation across two assets (GLD and GDX) to derive a dynamic hedge ratio, (2) construction of a synthetic spread variable (Spread = GLD - hedge_ratio × GDX), and (3) mean reversion detection on that spread. The allowed indicator set contains only single-asset technical indicators and does not support multi-asset regression, cross-asset spread construction, or mean reversion statistics (e.g., Augmented Dickey-Fuller test, half-life calculation). Entry/exit thresholds are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be inferred. This strategy requires a custom pairs trading module outside the scope of single-asset indicator-based rules.
translation_notes: Signal requires quantitative modeling (OLS hedge ratio estimation, spread construction, stationarity testing) unavailable in the allowed indicator library. Recommend implementing as a separate strategy module with explicit regression engine and spread analytics.
